candidate_definition_hints.text: > ⚠️ Oh My Fish has been unmaintained for years, and certain parts of it may not work for you. A few themes and packages are currently broken, and the code is due a significant overhaul. The current set of maintainers have ran out of steam, so if you are interested in becoming a…
